title: Raccoon Removal in Gerritsen Beach, Brooklyn | $900–$4,000

intro: Gerritsen Beach's unique waterfront location and mix of single-family homes make it particularly attractive to raccoons seeking shelter and food sources. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your Gerritsen Beach property from these intelligent and potentially destructive wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal with guaranteed results for homeowners throughout this tight-knit Brooklyn community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Gerritsen Beach residents for years with specialized knowledge of the area's unique wildlife challenges, from waterfront properties to residential neighborhoods near Marine Park. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, provide complete attic restoration, and offer same-day emergency service to protect your home and family.
localContext: Gerritsen Beach's proximity to Marine Park, Jamaica Bay, and its many single-family homes with attics and crawl spaces create ideal conditions for raccoon infestations. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and backyard gardens often attract raccoons searching for food, making professional removal services essential for protecting your property value and family safety.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Gerritsen Beach?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Gerritsen Beach typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Gerritsen Beach?
faqs.answer: Gerritsen Beach's waterfront location, proximity to Marine Park, abundance of single-family homes with accessible attics, and mature trees provide ideal habitat for raccoons. The neighborhood's residential garbage, pet food, and backyard features offer easy food sources that attract these opportunistic animals year-round.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Gerritsen Beach residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose several risks including rabies transmission, aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young, property damage from tearing through roofs and siding, and contamination from feces that can contain dangerous parasites like raccoon roundworm. Professional removal is always recommended for safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Gerritsen Beach home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Gerritsen Beach residents and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, though mothers with babies may require additional time to ensure humane removal of the entire family.
